name: Chicken or Veal Marsala
recipeInstructions:
1. In a hot non-stick pan, sauté the garlic until it becomes light brown.
2. Dust the chicken cutlets with flour and sauté in oil until golden brown on both sides (in garlic-flavored oil). Do this quickly and lightly. Remove from skillet and set aside.
3. Add the mushrooms to the pan and sauté until wilted.
4. Pour in the 1/2 cup Marsala wine and scrape up the brown bits that are on the bottom of the pan.
5. Add the chicken broth (your own or a good quality store-bought brand) and stir well, reducing the liquid just slightly.
6. Return the veal or chicken to the pan and simmer (barely) for about 15 minutes.
7. Serve over rice or noodles.
Note: Fresh mushrooms were used in this recipe, but canned sliced mushrooms can also be used if fresh ones are not available. The dish can be held in a warm oven until ready to serve. It is considered an easy yet fancy dish.
